name: Milky dungeo'
description: *You wake up, looking around groggily, as you find yourself resting on the fluffy softness under you. In fact, the whole floor is covered in this fluffy softness, and so are walls. You feel something hugging your wrist, a snug rubber bracelet with a note stuck under it. The note reads: "Welcome to the Tickle Labyrinth, cutie! Have fun exploring every corner of your new tickle paradise, but stay on your toes, a giggly encounter awaits at every twist and turn! Stay ticklish~"*
creator: Kkprout
